agent_analysis:
# CRITICAL — FRIDAY EXPIRY MONITOR

## Position Status

### AMD CALL | P&L: -29% | CLOSE NOW
Stock moved +3.5% in our direction this week and the option is still down 29%. This tells the whole story: charm and theta ate the delta. A 0.35 delta entry on Monday likely decayed to ~0.10-0.12 by today — the stock rallied but the option couldn't keep up. At expiry, this is nearly pure intrinsic value or zero. No recovery path. **Close immediately.**

### MRVL CALL | P&L: -36% | CLOSE NOW
Stock only +1.0% on the week against a call thesis. With ~4%/day theta cost over 5 days, that's roughly 20% of premium gone to decay alone. Delta has drifted well below 0.10 — this is approaching the delta stop threshold. At -36% with hours to expiry, the option is likely far OTM with negligible extrinsic value remaining. Holding gains nothing. **Close immediately.**

### RTX PUT | P&L: -39% | CLOSE NOW
Stock +0.1% — essentially flat, but the put thesis needed downside movement. Theta destroyed 39% of premium waiting for a move that never came. One tick from the -50% hard stop. This is a time-decay casualty with zero chance of recovery in the remaining hours. **Close immediately.**

---

## Portfolio Summary

| Position | P&L | Verdict |
|----------|-----|---------|
| AMD CALL | -29% | Close |
| MRVL CALL | -36% | Close |
| RTX PUT | -39% | Close |

**Estimated portfolio hit: ~-35% weighted average across 3 positions.**

---

## RECOMMENDATION

**CLOSE ALL THREE POSITIONS BEFORE 2:00 PM ET. MARKET ORDERS IF NEEDED. NO EXCEPTIONS.**

Bid-ask spreads are widening as we speak — every minute you wait past noon costs real money on fills. There is no scenario where any of these recover. AMD is the "best" at -29% and even it has no path to the +10% Friday target.

**Post-close note for reflection:** All three positions lost to theta/charm decay despite AMD moving 3.5% in the right direction. This week's lesson is stark — the directional calls were partially right (2 of 3 stocks moved favorably) but strike selection or entry timing allowed time decay to dominate. Worth investigating whether tighter delta targets (0.40-0.45) or deeper ITM strikes would have preserved more value through the week.
